summary.exit: 無 P0 且 P1 ≤ 2 → Phase 2 收斂

findings.problem: ensure_post_build_task 與 design 的 run_post_build 命名/spawn 責任不一致
findings.resolution: accepted — PLAN 註明 ensure_post_build_task = run_post_build 的 spawn 入口封裝

findings.problem: rebuild timing log 讀數未列 Phase 6 證據 → 降階條款無人執行
findings.resolution: accepted — gate 節補 timing log 讀數入 evidence + >60s 降階處置
